offer: For property managers handling 10-20 properties, inefficient tracking of maintenance schedules causes late work orders. We automate work order triggers instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or emails.
problem: Inefficient tracking of maintenance schedules and work orders.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property management help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of maintenance schedules
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
